name: mathread
description: Local provenance-first PDF capture service and browser shim

scripts.build: bun build ./extension/mathread/background.ts ./extension/mathread/link-origin.ts --outdir dist/extension/mathread --target browser && cp extension/manifest.json dist/extension/manifest.json
scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist/extension && cp extension/manifest.json dist/extension/manifest.json && bun build --watch ./extension/mathread/background.ts ./extension/mathread/link-origin.ts --outdir dist/extension/mathread --target browser
